questions.question: What is Greedy Layerwise Training and how does it work?
keyPoints: Use unsupervised learning to pre-train each layer

questions.question: What are the advantages and disadvantages of Greedy Layerwise Training?
keyPoints: Advantages: avoids vanishing gradient problem, makes training deep networks more efficient
Disadvantages: may not always find optimal solution

questions.question: Compare and contrast Greedy Layerwise Training with traditional backpropagation.
keyPoints: Greedy Layerwise Training trains each layer separately
Traditional backpropagation trains the entire network simultaneously
Advantages and disadvantages of each approach
